summary: Brand icons now use transparent backgrounds on the Dock, sidebar, and website so the logo blends cleanly on dark UI instead of showing a white box.
introduced: Sidebar brand mark — the DiskWise title in the left panel now shows the app icon beside the name
changed: Dock icon — the normal (non-scanning) Dock tile uses the transparent AppIconSource artwork
App and website icons — regenerated PNGs drop white matting while keeping logo details like the checkmark
Website header — hero and header logos blend on the dark marketing site without a white backdrop
Icon pipeline — edge flood-fill transparency processing for app, dock scanning, and hero assets
